introSection: Drachenwirbel is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Freizeitpark Plohn in Lengenfeld, Saxony, Germany. The ride opened on 14 April 2017.
fullText:
Drachenwirbel is a steel spinning kiddie roller coaster located at Freizeitpark Plohn in Lengenfeld, Saxony, Germany. The ride opened on 14 April 2017.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
